M-077.NAME: matrix-motion-interactions
M-077.path: frontend/src/components/MatrixBackground.tsx frontend/src/components/VisualShell.tsx frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/pages/Referrals.tsx frontend/src/components/SubscriptionPanel.tsx frontend/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/components/MatrixBackground.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/VisualShell.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProto.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProtoAnalytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/index.css docs/plans/Phase-59.xml docs/plans/Phase-68.xml scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs
M-077.owns: Premium Matrix motion language and microinteractions across user and admin frontends.
M-077.purpose: Add high-quality interaction feedback without scroll hijacking, motion overload, or workflow blocking.

exports.interaction-status-transition: VPN, MTProto, subscription, alert, and health state transitions.
exports.interaction-route-transition: Short route entrance transitions that preserve navigation speed.
exports.interaction-root-transform-safety: Route transition transform is applied to the content layer, not the root fixed-background shell.
exports.rule-reduced-motion: Static/fade-only fallback for all motion-heavy effects.
exports.interaction-phase71-close-and-calendar: Icon-only QR close button, device row selection feedback, sticky action feedback, and subscription boundary pulse with reduced-motion fallback.
exports.interaction-phase72-touch-dock: Touch dock focus/active underline and compact transform feedback without scroll hijacking or pointer interception.

constraints.constraint-1: No scroll hijacking, pointer interception, keyboard trap, blocking loader, or long decorative animation.
constraints.constraint-2: All motion must respect prefers-reduced-motion and inactive-tab lifecycle.
constraints.constraint-3: Critical text, forms, tables, QR/config, and admin controls must remain readable during transitions.
constraints.constraint-4: Route transform animation must not create a transformed ancestor for fixed Matrix canvas/fallback layers.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: User and admin builds pass with motion smoke.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Reduced-motion static-route proof confirms static/fade fallback markers; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Smoke confirms pointer-events safety and no scroll hijacking markers.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Phase-59 smoke confirms root shell does not carry motion-route-enter and the content layer does.

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: node scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs, phase55-premium-art-direction-smoke.mjs, phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs, and phase57-premium-user-cabinet-smoke.mjs passed.
2026-06-04: protected backend/deploy/runtime diff guard passed; post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke passed after HEAD included Phase-59 frontend changes.

2026-06-04: rainfix updated Phase-59 smoke to assert CSS rain fallback, mobile overscan, visualViewport listeners, and root transform safety; node scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs passed.
2026-06-04: Phase-68 reused motion-interactive/status primitives for compact dashboard/subscription controls; Phase-59 and Phase-68 smokes passed.

phase-71-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Use bounded motion for the new X close icon, selected device rows, sticky action controls, and subscription start/end day pulse without scroll hijacking or transform-heavy reduced-motion regressions.
phase-71-executed-scope.verification: Phase-71 smoke and Phase-59 regression assert motion budget, pointer/scroll safety, keyboard focus safety, and reduced-motion fallback.

M-077.hotspot: H-064: Motion and microinteractions must respect reduced-motion, avoid scroll hijacking, and never block operational workflows.
M-077.phase-71-evidence: Phase-71 smoke passed for QR close motion, selected-device row feedback, sticky action motion, calendar boundary pulse, and reduced-motion safeguards.

phase-72-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Add bounded bottom-dock hover/focus/active feedback and preserve reduced-motion, keyboard focus, pointer-scroll, and no-scroll-hijack guarantees.
phase-72-executed-scope.verification: Phase-72 smoke and Phase-59 motion regression passed locally with protected backend/deploy/runtime guards clean.

M-077.phase-72-evidence: Matrix motion interactions passed local Phase-72 verification for touch dock reveal and reduced-motion nav safety.
